summary: Implemented specbridge-artifact-inventory as a deterministic, read-only local CLI surface for repository evidence growth. The command reports the main .specbridge evidence families, per-family counts, bytes, latest modified timestamps, retention_posture=preserve, cleanup_permission=none, aggregate totals, and retention_enforcement=none. Optional file output is limited to .specbridge/artifact-inventory/current.inventory.json and requires -Force when replacing.
policy_result: Within policy. All changed files are inside the issue-209 exclusive_write scope. No protected files, secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, database, dependency, deployment, workflow, CI/CD security, operator decision registry, issue #194, or digital twin changes are included.
risk_result: Within bounds. The command is read-only when -OutputPath is omitted and the only allowed write path is the governed inventory artifact. The feature explicitly performs no deletion, archival, pruning, compression, movement, or retention enforcement.
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI is pending until branch push and PR creation.
Post-merge closure is still required after the primary PR merges.
merge_status: Pending PR creation, GitHub CI, and merge gate.
